name: files-editor
description: FileEditor moveable window — markdown click-to-edit + CodeMirror code editor. Imported lazily from App.tsx so CodeMirror only enters the user's bundle when a code file is opened in edit mode (saves ~600 KB on the initial chunk per registers-doc §4.21e). The bridge object `fileEditor.open()` stays in core (frontend/src/modals/file-editor.ts) so vanilla callers (FilePicker, chat.ts, FileManager) keep working unchanged.
